title: deyeuxia minima
intro: Deyeuxia minima, also known as Chinese Needle Grass or Tufts of Hairgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its small, green, and feathery leaves. The plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. Deyeuxia minima has been found to have health benefits such as reducing pain and swelling, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried, crushed, and then used as a tea or decoction to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
